summary: Silent implicit selection is resolved and production Git/fresh-process tests now pass, but the committed test plan still overstates managed-worktree fresh-process coverage.
inspection_summary: Inspected current HEAD def9e98 and re-ran focused regressions. No files were modified.
judgment_delta: runtime-production-worktree-evidence-gap -> production Git and fresh-process evidence added, but the Test Plan overstates managed fresh-process coverage.

findings.detail: The Test Plan claims a managed Run subprocess fixture across both control roots, while the actual proof is compositional. Revise the plan or add the fixture.
